# Complete Cannabis Grower’s Shopping List Examples
_Last updated Dec 19, 2025_
by Nebula Haze
## **Examples of Common Cannabis Growing Setups**
This page will lead you to some setup shopping lists for a handful of the most popular styles of growing cannabis. You can use the information below to help decide which type of lighting you want to use if you don’t already know. The type of lighting you use will steer you towards some guides that will show you everything that’s needed to get started growing potent homegrown cannabis. You’ll get the initial setup cost, the cost to reach your first harvest (the highest cost), and the cost of subsequent harvests **(much** cheaper after the first).
### 2’x2′ Grow Tent – Small
  * **Ultra short edition – 3′ tall**
    * 65W – [HLG 65 LED Grow Light](https://www.amazon.com/Horticulture-Lighting-Group-High-Efficiency-Upgraded/dp/B076QDKVDZ?crid=3JOCN0G689TT6&keywords=HLG%2B65%2BLED%2BGrow%2BLight&qid=1705080188&sprefix=%2Caps%2C130&sr=8-1-spons&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.006c50ae-5d4c-4777-9bc0-4513d670b6bc&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=57b06cf97728d1216606ed6b3a0aad0a&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
    * 1-3 oz per harvest
    * [$300 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-cannabis-for-300-in-this-mini-grow-kit-up-to-3-oz-harvest-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
  * **Room to grow – 4′ tall**
    * 100W – [SF-1000 LED Grow Light](https://www.amazon.com/Spider-Farmer-Dimmable-MeanWell-Spectrum/dp/B07TS82HWB?crid=2SG3VQR061G81&keywords=SF-1000%2BLED%2BGrow%2BLight&qid=1705080215&sprefix=sf-1000%2Bled%2Bgrow%2Blight%2Caps%2C162&sr=8-1-spons&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.f5122f16-c3e8-4386-bf32-63e904010ad0&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=52cb108f11b585f648e5efe72b75b39d&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
    * 2-4 oz per harvest
    * [$430 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/harvest-up-to-4-oz-cannabis-in-this-100w-led-mini-grow-kit-complete-setup-weed-growing-tutorial)

Example of a 2’x2′ grow tent with [100W LED Grow Light](https://www.amazon.com/Spider-Farmer-Dimmable-MeanWell-Spectrum/dp/B07TS82HWB?crid=2SG3VQR061G81&keywords=SF-1000%2BLED%2BGrow%2BLight&qid=1705080215&sprefix=sf-1000%2Bled%2Bgrow%2Blight%2Caps%2C162&sr=8-1-spons&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.f5122f16-c3e8-4386-bf32-63e904010ad0&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=52cb108f11b585f648e5efe72b75b39d&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (up to 4 oz)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/mini-tent-hlg-100-led-grow-light.jpg)
### 2’x4′ Grow Tent – Medium
  * **Standard Power – 5′ tall**
    * 200W – [SF-2000 LED grow light](https://www.amazon.com/Spider-Farmer-SF2000-Dimmable-Hydroponics/dp/B07TVD1Y3K?crid=341DPAS9E0JD3&keywords=sf-2000+led+grow+light&qid=1705080245&sprefix=SF-2000+LED+grow+light%2Caps%2C177&sr=8-8&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.f5122f16-c3e8-4386-bf32-63e904010ad0&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=a51f3dc376fd46f585629f426a44c19d&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
    * 5-11 oz per harvest
    * [$555 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/200w-led-spider-farmer-sf-2000-cannabis-setup-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
  * **Max Power – 6′ tall**
    * 300W – [Mars Hydro TSL2000 LED](https://www.growweedeasy.com/mars-hydro-tsl2000-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial-300w-led)
    * 7-13 oz per harvest
    * [$575 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/mars-hydro-tsl2000-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial-300w-led)
  * **Over Power – 6′ tall**
    * 300-400W range (dimmable) – for growers who go crazy with power
    * Up to 16 oz per harvest
    * [$495 to get started with a 400W HPS](https://www.growweedeasy.com/400w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
    * [$745 to get started with 315 LEC](https://www.growweedeasy.com/315w-lec-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
    * [$890 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/hlg-350r-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial) with [HLG 350R](https://www.amazon.com/Horticulture-Lighting-Group-Quantum-Certified/dp/B08KYNTRWN?crid=2VSNMWTIDAGMA&keywords=HLG+350R+LED+grow+light&qid=1705080285&sprefix=hlg+350r+led+grow+light%2Caps%2C167&sr=8-5&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.2b70bf2b-6730-4ccf-ab97-eb60747b8daf&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=595a1d8760f7879a528ef66e177d42c4&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (Massively overpowered LED)

Here’s my current grow inside one of these right now. I think this is the perfect size for most home growers because it can yield many ounces up to a pound per harvest depending on the grow light you use.
[200W LED grow light](https://www.amazon.com/Spider-Farmer-SF2000-Dimmable-Hydroponics/dp/B07TVD1Y3K?crid=341DPAS9E0JD3&keywords=sf-2000+led+grow+light&qid=1705080245&sprefix=SF-2000+LED+grow+light%2Caps%2C177&sr=8-8&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.f5122f16-c3e8-4386-bf32-63e904010ad0&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=a51f3dc376fd46f585629f426a44c19d&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) by Spider Farmer (up to 11 oz – [see the grow journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/led-grow-journal-mars-hydro-tsl-2000w-vs-spider-farmer-sf-2000))
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/spider-farmer-led-grow-tent-with-flash-harvest-sm.jpg)
### 3’x3′ Grow Tent (Square shape is better in some spaces) – Medium
  * **Max Power – 6′ tall**
    * 300W – [Mars Hydro FC-E3000](https://www.amazon.com/MARS-HYDRO-FC-E3000-Light-Dimmable/dp/B08Q35VJQL?keywords=mars+hydro&qid=1671034841&sr=8-3-spons&psc=1&smid=AKPEMWWZ95494&spLa=ZW5jcnlwdGVkUXVhbGlmaWVyPUEyVkJNMVVST0hKU0ZaJmVuY3J5cHRlZElkPUEwMTc3NTc4WkwxQ0dTWExGUkVQJmVuY3J5cHRlZEFkSWQ9QTA2OTk3NDFVOFdHUFAyRlIxUE4md2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGYmYWN0aW9uPWNsaWNrUmVkaXJlY3QmZG9Ob3RMb2dDbGljaz10cnVl&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=a90dd2086fd09563bcf63977c3570e37&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
    * 7-13 oz per harvest
    * [$475 to get started with FC-E3000](https://www.growweedeasy.com/mars-hydro-fc-e3000-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
  * **Max Power (cold grow room) – 6′ tall**
    * 315 LEC or 400W HPS (dimmable)
    * 7-16 oz per harvest
    * [$745 to get started with 315 LEC](https://www.growweedeasy.com/315w-lec-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
    * [$495 to get started with a 400W HPS](https://www.growweedeasy.com/400w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)

Example of a single hydro plant growing in a 3’x3′ grow tent with a 400W HPS. You could fit more plants if you use pots instead of hydro
Mars Hydro has a remarkably cheap yet effective [new 300W LED](https://www.amazon.com/MARS-HYDRO-FC-E3000-Light-Dimmable/dp/B08Q35VJQL?keywords=mars%2Bhydro&qid=1671034841&sr=8-3-spons&smid=AKPEMWWZ95494&spLa=ZW5jcnlwdGVkUXVhbGlmaWVyPUEyVkJNMVVST0hKU0ZaJmVuY3J5cHRlZElkPUEwMTc3NTc4WkwxQ0dTWExGUkVQJmVuY3J5cHRlZEFkSWQ9QTA2OTk3NDFVOFdHUFAyRlIxUE4md2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGYmYWN0aW9uPWNsaWNrUmVkaXJlY3QmZG9Ob3RMb2dDbGljaz10cnVl&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=d7c0743a85163f5fa43b2eab7cd3f711&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (harvest up to 13 oz) for a 3’x3′ released in 2025
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/cannabis-grown-by-300w-quantum-board-leds-depthchargeseeds.jpg)
### 4’x4′ Grow Tent – Large
  * **1+ lb LED Producer – 6.5′ tall**
    * [HLG Blackbird 600W](https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B09QV4M21P?th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=84941503a807ef5163880ce6a139dea2&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) LED grow light
    * 11-22 oz per harvest
    * [$995 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/hlg-blackbird-600w-premium-led-cannabis-grow-setup-shopping-list-up-to-1-5-lb-yield)
  * **1+ lb HPS Producer 6.5′ tall**
    * [600W HPS](https://www.amazon.com/iPower-Digital-Dimmable-System-Reflector/dp/B00E5O82XE?crid=3V2TZKRAQKRI2&keywords=600w%2Bhps%2Bkit&qid=1705081840&s=lawn-garden&sprefix=600w%2Bhps%2Bkit%2Clawngarden%2C119&sr=1-6&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.f5122f16-c3e8-4386-bf32-63e904010ad0&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=9febaa390c1b01946947b34e0645557c&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (dimmable)
    * 10-21 oz per harvest
    * [$495 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/600w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)

Example of a 4’x4′ grow tent (easily yield a pound – see the [grow journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress))
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/example-4x4-grow-tent-led-grow-light-cannabis-harvest.jpg)
Now that you’ve got an overview, let’s look at each of the cannabis grow kits a little closer.
* * *
## Example Setups for Different Lighting Types
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-cannabis-for-300-in-this-mini-grow-kit-up-to-3-oz-harvest-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
[**65W LED Mini Tent**](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-cannabis-for-300-in-this-mini-grow-kit-up-to-3-oz-harvest-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
Average Yield: 1-3 oz Per Harvest
Initial Setup Cost: $300
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/harvest-up-to-4-oz-cannabis-in-this-100w-led-mini-grow-kit-complete-setup-weed-growing-tutorial)
[**100W LED Grow Light in Mini Tent**](https://www.growweedeasy.com/harvest-up-to-4-oz-cannabis-in-this-100w-led-mini-grow-kit-complete-setup-weed-growing-tutorial)
Average Yield: 2-4 oz per Harvest
Initial Setup Cost: $430 to get started
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/200w-led-spider-farmer-sf-2000-cannabis-setup-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
[**200W LED (Only need 5 feet of height)**](https://www.growweedeasy.com/200w-led-spider-farmer-sf-2000-cannabis-setup-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
Can fit in some closets
Average Yield: 5-11 oz Per Harvest
Initial Setup Cost: $555 to start
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/250w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/mars-hydro-tsl2000-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial-300w-led)
[**300W LED Setup**](https://www.growweedeasy.com/mars-hydro-tsl2000-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial-300w-led)
Average Yield: 7-13 oz Per Harvest
Cost: $575 to Start
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/315w-lec-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
[**315W LEC Grow Light**](https://www.growweedeasy.com/315w-lec-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
Average Yield: 7-13 oz per Harvest
Cost: $745 to Start
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/hlg-350r-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
[**350W LED Setup**](https://www.growweedeasy.com/hlg-350r-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
Average Yield: 8-14 oz Per Harvest
Cost: $700 to Start
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/400w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
[**400W MH/HPS**](https://www.growweedeasy.com/400w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
Average Yield: 7-14 oz Per Harvest
Cost: $495 to start
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/600w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
[**600W MH/HPS Grow Setup**](https://www.growweedeasy.com/600w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
Average Yield: 10-21 oz Per Harvest
Cost: $495 to start
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/hlg-blackbird-600w-premium-led-cannabis-grow-setup-shopping-list-up-to-1-5-lb-yield)
[**600W Premium LED Grow Light Setup**](https://www.growweedeasy.com/hlg-blackbird-600w-premium-led-cannabis-grow-setup-shopping-list-up-to-1-5-lb-yield)
Average Yield: 10-22 oz per Harvest
Cost: $995 to start
Although there are larger size grow lights available (1000W and beyond), at that size it starts going outside the scope of a “hobbyist” grower as far as ease and yields. Also, I’ve found it’s typically better to have multiple 300W or 600W lights than one enormous grow light
Learn the basics of growing weed: [Beginner’s Guide](https://www.growweedeasy.com/basics)
###  These Cannabis Growing Setup Examples Assume You’re Starting From Scratch and Don’t Plan to DIY Anything
I tried to include  _everything_ in these lists, as if someone were growing marijuana completely from scratch. For each example I calculated the cost as if you were **buying everything online off of Amazon.com** from the included links. A lot of these items cost less money if you shop around online or buy them in person, and you may already have some stuff lying around the house already.
For each example I also included a matching grow tent, because I believe grow tents are the best way to create a perfect environment for your plant at a really low cost. But if you want to skip the tent and make your own grow space in a grow box or closet, [learn how to create the perfect growing environment for your plants](https://www.growweedeasy.com/perfect-growing-environment)!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/05/sirius-mh-hps-grow-tent-setup.jpg)
2 healthy, manifolded plants under a 600W MH (Metal Halide)

Over the years we’ve had lots of people request “starter” shopping lists for new growers – it can be frustrating trying to figure out  _exactly_ what supplies you need to start growing cannabis indoors! So today I decided to make a few comprehensive shopping lists for common setups that include everything from nutrients to grow lights to rope ratchets. I’ll even tell you what **yields, electricity cost** and **cost/ounce** to expect with each setup.
If you don’t want to have to figure out exactly what to buy to start growing, this article is for you! I will break down what to expect based on your space limits and desired yields, so you can get the exact perfect setup for your situation.
I need more/different help! [Take me to the 10-Step Quick Start Grow Guide](https://www.growweedeasy.com/marijuana-quick-start-grow-guide)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/05/potent-marijuana-nug-on-table.jpg)
* * *
### Don’t Forget to Budget Money for Growing Medium and Plant Containers!
_Remember_ to consider the growing medium (not included in totals). Here’s my very general estimate for 1-2 plants (you will need more to grow more plants). So consider you will need to spend an extra $30-125 for your growing medium + the cost of your container.
**Choose One:**
  * **Super Soil $40** (for 10 gallons of [super soil](https://www.amazon.com/Organic-Super-Soil-Concentrated-Strength/dp/B079TC27PZ?pd_rd_i=B079TC27PZ&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=821aa8329300af22d2d8444ceeb1e56f&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)) + [container](https://www.growweedeasy.com/choose-right-pot)  
<https://www.growweedeasy.com/super-soil>
  * **Soil $30** (for 10 gallons [Happy Frog soil](https://www.amazon.com/FoxFarm-Happy-Frog-Potting-Cubic/dp/B00CJJ7V70?ie=UTF8&qid=1463266706&sr=8-2&keywords=happy+frog+soil&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=d586b6e46a87d7392a2318335f211125&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)) + [container](https://www.growweedeasy.com/choose-right-pot)  
<https://www.growweedeasy.com/soil>
  * **Coco Coir $30** (for 2x [coco bricks](https://www.amazon.com/Plantonix-Coco-listed-Organic-Bricks/dp/B01N1YP8O6?keywords=coco+coir+brick&qid=1638247189&sr=8-5&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=72b9e07d074501bb4e329f6e1e9ce505&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) + [perlite](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B06XS3L67W?psc=1&pd_rd_i=B06XS3L67W&pd_rd_w=hTzTb&pf_rd_p=887084a2-5c34-4113-a4f8-b7947847c308&pd_rd_wg=BzuT8&pf_rd_r=V4V4P6YNXYG559ZWJHMC&pd_rd_r=d8de6df3-c0f3-4f2d-a206-30858cb505b5&spLa=ZW5jcnlwdGVkUXVhbGlmaWVyPUExWkhWUjAwMEE5VTI0JmVuY3J5cHRlZElkPUEwNzMwNjQzVkdWVjBWRVc4TE1CJmVuY3J5cHRlZEFkSWQ9QTAxODM5OTUyWElJNFlNVEo4OUgwJndpZGdldE5hbWU9c3BfZGV0YWlsJmFjdGlvbj1jbGlja1JlZGlyZWN0JmRvTm90TG9nQ2xpY2s9dHJ1ZQ%3D%3D&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=ff16b8edc82a7cb0393b4dcef8c0e567&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) for 10 gallons) + [container](https://www.growweedeasy.com/choose-right-pot)  
<https://www.growweedeasy.com/coco>
  * **Hydroponics $150** (to make [reservoir](https://www.growweedeasy.com/high-yield-bubbleponics-technique#making-bubbleponics-system))  
<https://www.growweedeasy.com/hydro>

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
